summary: Iteration 103: BEO Operations System. Backend: 23/23 tests PASSED (100%). All new features working: Banquet Workforce (20 staff, PTO conflict detection, EchoAi³ substitutes, auto-scheduling), Production Engine (order consolidation with yields, buying programs Avendra/Foodbuy, production timeline), Event Layouts (7 rooms, auto-placement, approval workflow, template saving), EchoAi³ ROI Analytics (675 min manual → 15.5 min echo per BEO, 97.7% efficiency, $7.9M annual savings at 50 events/day).
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 new route modules working correctly: banquet_workforce.py, production_engine.py, event_layouts.py, echoai3_roi.py
PTO conflict detection correctly identifies BEOs on requested dates and suggests substitute staff
Order consolidation applies 8% yield loss and calculates cases_to_order with surplus tracking
Buying programs (Avendra GPO 8%, Foodbuy 6%) correctly apply discounts to eligible categories
Event layout auto-placement generates appropriate elements (tables, buffet, entrance, AV) based on setup style
ROI metrics verified: 675 manual mins → 15.5 echo mins per BEO (97.7% efficiency gain)
Annual projections at 50 events/day: 192,360 hours saved, $7.9M cost savings, 68.7 FTE equivalent
seed_data_creation: Banquet staff (20) seeded on first /api/banquet-workforce/staff call. Test creates PTO requests, schedules, consolidated orders, layouts, templates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 103 tested BEO Operations System. All endpoints working: banquet-workforce (staff, PTO, schedule), production-engine (consolidate-orders, production-timeline, buying-programs), event-layouts (generate, approve, save-template, rooms), echoai3/roi (per-beo, annual, live). Key test data: PTO on 2026-02-15 detects 3 BEO conflicts. Consolidation across 3 BEOs shows $16.34 program savings.
